'''banuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avenacin|avenacin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avenacin|avenacin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| banuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bænikith|bænikith]] || [[word:bænikij|bænikij]] || [[word:bænikish|bænikish]] || [[word:bæniki|bæniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:banunukuth|banunukuth]] || [[word:banunukuj|banunukuj]] || [[word:banunukush|banunukush]] || [[word:banunuku|banunuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:banukuth|banukuth]] || [[word:banukuj|banukuj]] || [[word:banukush|banukush]] || [[word:banuku|banuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:banufkuth|banufkuth]] || [[word:banufkuj|banufkuj]] || [[word:banufkush|banufkush]] || [[word:banufkuf|banufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:banukuthu|banukuthu]] || [[word:banukuju|banukuju]] || [[word:banukushu|banukushu]] || [[word:banukuku|banukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:banukuth|banukuth]] || [[word:banukuj|banukuj]] || [[word:banukush|banukush]] || [[word:banuku|banuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:banukuthul|banukuthul]] || [[word:banukujul|banukujul]] || [[word:banukushul|banukushul]] || [[word:banukukul|banukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:banukuthuthu|banukuthuthu]] || [[word:banukujuju|banukujuju]] || [[word:banukushushu|banukushushu]] || [[word:banukuku|banukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:banukuthun|banukuthun]] || [[word:banukujun|banukujun]] || [[word:banukushun|banukushun]] || [[word:banukukun|banukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:banukuthuoro|banukuthuoro]] || [[word:banukujuoro|banukujuoro]] || [[word:banukushuoro|banukushuoro]] || [[word:banukukuoro|banukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
